---
name: 💡 Feature Request | 功能请求
about: Suggest an idea for this project | 为这个项目提出想法
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 Feature Description | 功能描述

**English:** Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

**中文：** 您的功能请求是否与问题相关？请描述。

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the problem is | 清晰简洁地描述问题是什么 -->

**Example | 示例:**
- English: I'm always frustrated when [...]
- 中文: 当 [...] 时我总是感到沮丧

---

## 🎯 Proposed Solution | 建议的解决方案

**English:** Describe the solution you'd like.

**中文：** 描述您想要的解决方案。

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen | 清晰简洁地描述您希望发生什么 -->

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered | 考虑的替代方案

**English:** Describe alternatives you've considered.

**中文：** 描述您考虑过的替代方案。

<!-- A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered | 清晰简洁地描述您考虑过的任何替代解决方案或功能 -->

---

## 📊 Use Case | 用例

**English:** Describe the use case for this feature.

**中文：** 描述此功能的用例。

### Who would benefit? | 谁将受益？
<!-- Describe the target users | 描述目标用户 -->

### How would it be used? | 它将如何使用？
<!-- Describe the usage scenario | 描述使用场景 -->

---

## 🖼️ Mockups / Examples | 模型 / 示例

**English:** If applicable, add mockups, diagrams, or examples to help explain your feature request.

**中文：** 如果适用，请添加模型、图表或示例以帮助解释您的功能请求。

<!-- Add mockups here | 在此添加模型 -->

---

## 🐱 Which Cat Should Handle This? | 哪只猫咪应该处理这个？

**English:** Which agent/cat module would be most appropriate for this feature?

**中文：** 哪个代理/猫咪模块最适合这个功能？

- [ ] 🍊 Zeus (Coordination | 协调) - Project-wide features
- [ ] 🎀 Athena (Architecture | 架构) - Design and structure changes
- [ ] 🐯 Hephaestus (Implementation | 实现) - Code implementation
- [ ] 🔵 Apollo (Testing | 测试) - Testing infrastructure
- [ ] 🧶 Hermes (Integration | 集成) - External integrations
- [ ] ⚫ Artemis (Security | 安全) - Security features
- [ ] 🤖 General (General | 通用) - Multiple areas

---

## 📋 Implementation Notes | 实现说明

**English:** If you have ideas on how this could be implemented, please share:

**中文：** 如果您有关于如何实现此功能的想法，请分享：

### Technical Approach | 技术方法
<!-- Describe the technical approach | 描述技术方法 -->

### Potential Challenges | 潜在挑战
<!-- Describe potential challenges | 描述潜在挑战 -->

---

## 🎯 Priority | 优先级

**English:** How important is this feature to you?

**中文：** 这个功能对您有多重要？

- [ ] 🔴 Critical (Blocking my work | 阻碍我的工作)
- [ ] 🟠 High (Would significantly improve my experience | 会显著改善我的体验)
- [ ] 🟡 Medium (Nice to have | 有的话很好)
- [ ] 🟢 Low (Just an idea | 只是个想法)

---

## 🤝 Willing to Contribute? | 愿意贡献？

**English:** Are you willing to help implement this feature?

**中文：** 您是否愿意帮助实现这个功能？

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this myself | 是的，我想自己实现这个
- [ ] Yes, I can help with design/testing | 是的，我可以帮助设计/测试
- [ ] No, but I can provide more details | 不，但我可以提供更多细节
- [ ] No, just suggesting | 不，只是建议

---

## ✅ Checklist | 检查清单

**English:** Before submitting, please confirm:

**中文：** 提交前，请确认：

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this feature has not been requested | 我已搜索现有 issue，此功能未被请求
- [ ] I have provided a clear description and use case | 我已提供清晰的描述和用例
- [ ] This feature aligns with DailyClaw's vision | 此功能符合 DailyClaw 的愿景

---

<div align="center">

**Thank you for your suggestion! | 感谢您的建议！** 🐱✨

</div>
